---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Improve documentation, guides, examples, or explanations
title: "[DOCS] "
---

# Documentation Update

## Summary

Describe the documentation change.

## Type of Documentation Change

- [ ] Typo or grammar fix
- [ ] Clarification
- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Example improvement
- [ ] Installation guide improvement
- [ ] Architecture explanation
- [ ] Research documentation
- [ ] Other

## Affected Files

List the files modified.

Example:

```
README.md
INSTALL.md
docs/architecture.md
```

## Motivation

Why is this change helpful?

## Verification

- [ ] Documentation reviewed for accuracy
- [ ] Links checked
- [ ] Examples reviewed

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know.
